Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 124 

LTSS_LVL_CD_3_LTST 

LABEL: Long-Term Services and Supports Provider 3 Level of Care Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: The level of care provided to the beneficiary by the third of up to three long-term care facilities; most 
recent in the calendar year 

SHORT NAME: LTSS_LVL_CD_3_LTST 

LONG NAME: LTSS_LVL_CD_3_LTST 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S):
